theme: What happens 48 hours before a corporate event — behind the scenes

linkedin.text:
The fire drill nobody asked for is the reason your event goes perfectly. We run one before every single event — 48 hours out, while 120 executives are still en route to Lisbon.

What that day actually looks like:
06:00 — First venue walk. Every table, every microphone, every emergency exit.
08:00 — Kosher catering tasted and approved. Wine list trimmed (the CEO thanks us later).
10:00 — Stage build. LED wall test finds one dead pixel. Replaced by noon.
13:00 — First guests land to a branded welcome team already in place.
15:00 — Fire drill. Not required. We always do it.
18:00 — Dietary restrictions cross-checked: 4 vegans, 2 gluten-free, 1 nut allergy. Zero surprises.
22:00 — Full team briefing: every position, every backup, every protocol.

By the time your people land, all they see is seamless. That's what 200+ events since 2010 buys you.

📅 DM us to see what production discipline looks like for your event.

#IncentiveTravel #CorporateEvents #EventPlanning #B2BEvents #MICE #Leadership #Lisbon

facebook.text:

Because 48 hours before 120 executives land in Lisbon, this is what care looks like:

⏰ 06:00 — Full venue walk (every mic, every exit)
🔥 15:00 — Fire drill (not required — we always do it)
📋 18:00 — Dietary restrictions cross-checked
🎯 22:00 — Team briefing with emergency protocols

By the time your team lands, all they see is seamless.

200+ events across 120+ countries since 2010 — with zero major incidents. That's what you're hiring.
